description_long: This skateboard features a pastel-colored deck adorned with a playful polka dot pattern in shades of green, blue, pink, and yellow. The deck has a classic double-kicktail shape, with both ends slightly upturned for performing tricks. The wheels are a bright yellow with blue centers, mounted on metallic trucks that appear to be a muted olive or gold color. The side profile reveals a standard skateboard thickness and curvature, suitable for street or park use. The deck's surface is smooth and lacks visible grip tape, suggesting it may be decorative or unfinished. No visible brand logos or text are present on any part of the skateboard.
description: A pastel polka dot skateboard with yellow wheels, blue centers, and metallic trucks, featuring a smooth deck with no visible grip tape or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, pastel polka dot deck, and two yellow wheels with blue centers partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the deck, the upturned nose and tail, and all four yellow wheels with blue centers.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the rounded tail, polka dot deck, and two yellow wheels with blue centers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the deck's curvature and all four wheels.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a playful polka dot pattern in pastel green, blue, pink, and yellow, evenly distributed across a beige background. There are no images, text, or additional motifs.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, small street wheels in bright yellow with blue centers, no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard skateboard trucks in a muted olive or gold color, with a traditional mounting and no visible branding or unique features.
